rationale: The citing and cited notes have strong topical and setting overlap: both analyze seeding strategy for unknown creators on a major UGC music platform using outbound interactions, and both reference similar large signup cohorts (including a 35,000-user cohort). The citing note explicitly frames its contribution as shifting prior influencer-seeding work to prospective influencers, and the matched reference is a direct DOI hit (10.1177/0022243718824081), so this does not look like an obvious incidental/background-only mention.
